title: citrus harmonilla
intro: Citrus harmonilla, also known as the Yellow Bells, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Rutaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Citrus harmonilla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat wounds due to its antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Citrus harmonilla can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote healing and relaxation.
